summary_ja: raw-backlog-ingest: 5 articles evaluated. All skipped as outside AI/LLM scope. Paul Graham (2001 programming language essay), Dan Luu (Twitter cache incidents), brutecat.com (Google Cloud RCE, already archived), LLVM blog (Flang/MLIR compiler), Miguel Grinberg (SQLAlchemy tutorial). No wiki pages created or updated.
